remember: Students will be able to define the term climate and explain its importance.
Students will be able to identify the factors influencing climate.
Students will be able to recall the types of climates and their characteristics.
understand: Students will be able to explain the difference between weather and climate.
Students will be able to describe the global distribution of climates.
Students will be able to understand the concept of Koppen's climate classification.
apply: Students will be able to apply their knowledge of climate to understand its impact on human activities.
Students will be able to use climate data to analyze and interpret the climate of a particular region.
Students will be able to apply the concept of climate change to real-life scenarios.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the factors responsible for climate change.
Students will be able to compare and contrast different climates and their effects on the environment.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of human activities on climate and suggest measures for mitigation.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1, to understand the concept of climate and its importance.
To comprehend the factors influencing climate and the global distribution of climates.
To apply the knowledge of climate to understand its impact on human activities and the environment.
board_exam_objectives: What CBSE tests from this chapter: Map skills related to climate, short answer questions on climate and climate change, and long answer questions on the factors influencing climate and its impact on human activities.
